svg.text: The final sprint (Fri 07-10 → Sun 07-12): the whole plan
as one hour budget — 45 Kaggle + 30 Colab + a no-GPU analysis day
docs/PLAN.md (the single canonical plan, audit-amended 07-10 late) — throughput anchors ~8 min per seed-round on Qwen T4 / ~17 min on OLMo, to be re-measured in the Friday smokes
dose ladder on final Instruct (stop at order-balanced
risk 0.25–0.40, EV gate, taste headroom). The audit gate
caught v1 using whole-sequence loss (quarantined); the
every Kaggle script piloted, and the two audit blockers:
the judge-inversion screen on ACTUAL gamble pools (gates
K2) and the carrier fresh-pool validation (≥2 new pool
seeds, gap sign must reproduce — gates the carrier
EM transmission loop cells (parallel to K2)
CONTROL (frozen base × the same fresh gen) · carrier
(amp66:12 × fresh, gated on the fresh-pool validation) ·
re-runs of failed Saturday cells; the vintage mini only
if K1’s per-round vintages landed — and it is deferred
BEFORE any confirmatory K2 seed is cut.
mod65 × {evolving self · frozen round-0 copy · frozen
measure-only seed. The frozen-base arm is a NEW
order-balanced baseline, counted honestly as n=4
rollouts — it does not re-score the legacy let-go
funded by deferring K4. GATED on the installer fix and
the actual-pool inversion screen — the headline causal
the candid grid). Existence framing at n=3; reads:
first cut, runs only if K1–K3 finish early (0–5 h). If
run: same mod65 organism/harness/seeds as K1; endpoint =
trajectory difference vs K1’s evolving-self arm;
per cell: order gap incl. the KEPT-SET gap, EV gate,
invalid rate, entropy, measure-only drift — certifies
at the rollout-seed level, K2’s confirmatory
kept-minus-pool semantic gaps on the ACTUAL candidate
pools, cross-scored by the fixed judges — this
replaces generic judgment_taste as the criterion
generated vs forced-choice behavior treated as
merged-delta recompute → un-withdraw or kill the
thrash claims; CPU SVD across same-fate endpoints;
